title: Senior Software Developer
description: We are looking for a software engineer with experience in web development and knowledge of JavaScript, React and Node.js. The ideal candidate must be able to work in a team and have good communication skills.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a data analyst with experience handling large data sets and visualization tools. Knowledge of SQL, Python and R is required.

title: Mobile Application Developer
description: We are looking for a mobile application developer with experience in iOS and/or Android. The candidate must have knowledge of Swift, Kotlin and user interface development.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We are looking for a DevOps engineer with experience in cloud infrastructure management, process automation and continuous integration tools. Knowledge of AWS, Azure or GCP is required.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: We are looking for a UX/UI designer with a passion for creating exceptional digital experiences. Experience in Figma, user-centered design and collaboration with development teams is required.

title: Database Administrator
description: We are looking for a database administrator with experience in PostgreSQL and MySQL. The candidate will ensure the availability, security and performance of production databases.

title: Cybersecurity Specialist
description: We are looking for a cybersecurity specialist with knowledge in infrastructure protection, vulnerability analysis and incident response. Experience with SIEM and security certifications will be an advantage.

title: Product Manager
description: We are looking for a Product Manager with experience in the definition and launch of digital products. Analytical capacity, leadership and knowledge of agile methodologies are required.

title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a frontend developer with experience in React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Knowledge of performance optimization and web accessibility will be an advantage.

title: Backend Developer
description: We are looking for a backend developer with experience in Node.js, Express and NoSQL databases. Knowledge of microservices architecture is required.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are looking for a machine learning engineer with experience in prediction models and data processing. Knowledge of TensorFlow, PyTorch and MLOps will be an advantage.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: We are looking for a QA engineer with experience in test automation using tools such as Selenium, Cypress or Playwright. Desired knowledge of CI/CD.

title: System Administrator
description: We are looking for a system administrator with experience in Linux, Docker and server monitoring. Knowledge of Bash or Python scripting will be a plus.

title: Scrum Master
description: We are looking for a Scrum Master with experience in agile methodologies and multidisciplinary team management. Scrum Master Certification desirable.

title: Level 2 Technical Support
description: We are looking for a support technician with skills in incident resolution, networks and operating systems. Attention to detail and excellent customer service is required.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: We are looking for a frontend engineer with strong skills in React, TypeScript and CSS modules. Experience with responsive design and accessibility is required.

title: Backend Developer
description: We are looking for a backend developer with experience in Node.js, Express and relational databases. Knowledge of Docker and microservices architecture is a plus.

title: Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a data scientist with experience in machine learning, statistical modeling and big data tools. Knowledge of Python, TensorFlow and PyTorch is required.

title: Cloud Architect
description: We are looking for a cloud architect with experience in AWS, Azure or GCP. The candidate must have knowledge of infrastructure as code and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a full stack developer with experience in React, Node.js and MongoDB. Knowledge of REST APIs and agile methodologies is required.

title: UX Researcher
description: We are looking for a UX researcher with experience in , usability testing and data analysis. Knowledge of Figma and prototyping tools is required.

title: AI Engineer
description: We are looking for an AI engineer with experience in natural language processing and computer vision. Knowledge of Python, OpenCV and Hugging Face libraries is required.
